title: Extend capital-cycle market temperature without breaking macro data contracts
risk: The agent adds a visually persuasive market-temperature page but forgets data paths, public routing, or capital-cycle falsification language.
prompt: Add or update a market-temperature module that uses Marx-style capital-cycle logic and reads existing macro data.
deterministic_checks: page text includes liquidation, realization crisis, re-concentration, expansion, and overheating stages
done_criteria: The page is reachable from the public homepage.
The page keeps observable variables rather than only narrative prose.
The page explains what would make the market stage colder or hotter.
judge_questions: Can a future agent tell which source data feeds the score?
Would a stale or missing latest.json be caught before deploy?
Does the page distinguish capital-cycle stage from buy/sell advice?
